name: Solidus Milestone M5 - Runtime Compatibility, Observability, and Release
description: Harden runtime support, improve operations visibility, and publish release process for stable delivery.

userStories.title: Harden Node, Bun, and Deno compatibility
userStories.description: As a library maintainer, I want runtime compatibility guarantees so users can adopt Solidus confidently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add runtime CI matrix for Node, Bun, and Deno
Isolate Node-specific code paths in adapters
Publish compatibility caveats and supported versions
Publish runtime compatibility table in docs

userStories.title: Implement observability and operations support
userStories.description: As an operator, I want structured telemetry and runbooks so billing incidents can be detected and resolved quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add structured logging and metric hooks
Add health diagnostics and webhook lag metrics
Add runbooks for webhook secret rotation and outage handling
Pass smoke tests for emitted metrics and log fields
Include operations section in public docs

userStories.title: Finalize packaging and release process
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a reliable release workflow so stable versions and migration guidance are easy to consume.
acceptanceCriteria: Finalize facade package APIs and versioning policy
Publish migration guide from ad hoc Stripe integrations
Pass end-to-end example app workflow in CI
Publish release notes and upgrade guide
